$comment: D-FFI-TCL-DESCRIPTOR (SQLite testfixture arc, C8 2026-07-17): RUN witness for the 5 TCL typedefs added to tcl.json (Tcl_ObjCmdProc/Tcl_CmdProc = FUNCTION-TYPE typedefs used as fn-pointers, Tcl_WideInt = i64, Tcl_DString = a 216-byte struct, Tcl_Channel = opaque ptr) — the dominant S0006 'undeclared type' blocker after C7 (13/44 src/test*.c hit it, dominantly Tcl_ObjCmdProc [27 uses] / Tcl_CmdProc [19]). The example registers a command via a `Tcl_ObjCmdProc *` (the fn-type typedef used as a pointer), libtcl calls it back on `mysum 2` summing a Tcl_WideInt(40) -> 42; also asserts sizeof(Tcl_DString)==216 at RUNTIME (a layout witness) and references a Tcl_Channel. elf-x86_64 only (tcl.json availableObjectFormats:[elf]); CI ubuntu x86_64 legs run it (libtcl8.6), native-arm64 arch-gates, windows/macos compile-only. RED-ON-DISABLE: drop any of the 5 typedefs from tcl.json -> that type's use fails S0006 -> fails to compile.
